name: eidos-storemetheus
description: Build and maintain governed Claude Code and Codex plugin stores for companies that need trusted AI operating layers.

interface.shortDescription: Build and check governed company plugin stores.
interface.longDescription: Eidos Storemetheus helps agents design, build, and maintain private or public plugin stores for organizations across Claude Code and Codex. It treats a plugin store as a governed trust surface: scoped plugins, host-specific manifests, review gates, install proof, cache/config visibility, operating cadence, and owner accountability.
defaultPrompt: Design a governed plugin store for this company.
Audit this plugin store before I share it.
Create the first plugin-store operating model.
Check this marketplace plugin works in both Claude Code and Codex.
